full_text:
Chen Tiao (Yuanhua) 陳調 (元化)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Tiao (陳調), styledYuanhua (元化), was born in Hanzhong. Local strongman, tried to avenge his master but was wounded and died in battle. Chen Tiao was affiliated with Su Gu. Chen Tiao lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
